zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Battell Barrington於大約1334年出生在英國艾可奧加時，他的父親John Battell32歲，母親Elizabeth Enfield16歲。他於大約1360年與Elizabeth Enfield在英國艾可結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1384年在英國賀特福爾被列為sheriff。他去世於大約1396年在英國享年64歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Battell Barrington于大约1334年出生在英国艾可奧加时，他的父亲John Battell32岁，母亲Elizabeth Enfield16岁。他于大约1360年与Elizabeth Enfield在英国艾可结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1384年在英国賀特福爾被列为sheriff。他去世于大约1396年在英国享年64岁。

nameMeanings.name: Battell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Battle
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from Old French de la bataile ‘(man) of the battle-array; warrior’. This name was taken to Scotland by a family from Umfreville, France, in the early 13th century.
Irish (Sligo and Mayo): adopted for Mac Concatha, ‘son of Cú Chatha’ a personal name meaning ‘hound of battle’ (where con is genitive of cú ‘hound’ + cath ‘battle’).
History: A John Battle from Yorkshire, England, settled in 1654 on the Nansemond, a stream in VA. His descendants became prominent in NC and GA.

nameMeanings.name: Barrington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places called Barrington. The one in Gloucestershire is named with the Old English personal name Beorn + -ing- denoting association + tūn ‘settlement’. The Somerset placename is of Norman origin, and is probably derived from Barentin in Seine-Maritime, France. The first element of the Cambridgeshire example is the genitive form of an unattested Old English personal name Bāra.
Irish: adopted as an English form of Gaelic Ó Bearáin, ‘descendant of Bearán’ (see Barnes 3 and Barron ).

variants.name: Barnes
meanings: English: habitational name from Barnes (on the Surrey bank of the Thames in London), named with Old English bere-ærn ‘barn, a storehouse for barley and other grain’, or a topographic name or metonymic occupational name for someone who lived by or worked at a barn or barns, from Middle English barn ‘barn, granary’.

English: variant of Barne, with excrescent -s, derived from either the Middle English personal name Bern, Barn (based on the Scandinavian personal name Biǫrn or Old English Beorn, both from a word meaning ‘warrior’), or from Middle English barn (Old Norse barn) ‘child’. The latter term is found as a byname for men of the upper classes; it might also have had the meaning ‘young man of a prominent family’, like Middle English child (see Child ).
Irish: in Ireland in many cases this is no doubt the English name, but in others it is possibly an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Bearáin ‘descendant of Bearán’, a byname meaning ‘spear’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Battell Barrington was born about 1334, in Ongar, Essex, England, his father, John Battell, was 32 and his mother, Elizabeth Enfield, was 16. He married Elizabeth Enfield about 1360, in Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. In 1384, at the age of 51, his occupation is listed as sheriff in Hertfordshire, England. He died about 1396, in England, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Battell Barrington est né environ 1334, à Ongar, Essex, Angleterre, son père, John Battell, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Enfield, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Enfield environ 1360, à Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. En 1384, à l’âge de 51 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff à Hertfordshire, Angleterre. Il est décédé environ 1396, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 64 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Battell Barrington um 1334 in Ongar, Essex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Battell 32 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Enfield 16. Er hat um 1360 in Essex, England Elizabeth Enfield geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1384, als er 51 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als sheriff in Hertfordshire, England aufgeführt. Er starb um 1396 im Alter von 64 Jahren in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Battell Barrington è nato il circa 1334 nel Ongar, Essex, England, il suo padre, John Battell, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Enfield, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Enfield circa 1360, nel Essex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Nel 1384, all'età di 51 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff nel Hertfordshire, England. Morì circa 1396, nel England, all'età di 64 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Battell Barringtonが約1334年にイギリスエセックスオンガーで生まれた時，父John Battellは32歳，母Elizabeth Enfieldは16歳であった。約1360年にイギリスエセックスでElizabeth Enfieldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。1384年，51歳の時，イギリスハートフォードシュアイアでの職業はsheriffと記録されている。彼は約1396年にイギリスで64歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Battell Barrington(이)가 대략 1334년 영국 에세스 옹가르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Battell(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Enfield(은)는 16세였다. 그는 대략 1360년 영국 에세스에서 Elizabeth Enfield(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1384년, 51세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 허트퍼드실르에서 sheriff이었다. 그는 대략 1396년 영국에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Battell Barrington nasceu aproximadamente 1334, em Ongar, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Battell, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Enfield, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Enfield aproximadamente 1360, em Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Em 1384, com 51 anos, sua profissão aparece como sheriff em Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1396, em Inglaterra, com 64 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Battell Barrington родился около 1334 г. в местности онгар, эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени John Battell было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Enfield, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Enfield около 1360 г. в местности эссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. В 1384 году, в возрасте 51 год,  он работал по профессии sheriff в местности хиртфордшир, Англия. Он умер около 1396 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 64 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Battell Barrington nació aproximadamente 1334, en Ongar, Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, John Battell, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Enfield, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Enfield aproximadamente 1360, en Essex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. En 1384, a la edad de 51 años, su ocupación registrada era sheriff en Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Murió aproximadamente 1396, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 64 años.
